# DIDI.BIKE

> DIDI.BIKE builds precision cycling telemetry sensors for aerodynamic profiling, posture analysis, and pedaling dynamics.

## Core Product

The DIDI.BIKE Sensor is a 14-gram device that mounts on any seat post. It measures aerodynamic drag (CdA), pedaling dynamics, and rider posture in real time at 100Hz with ±0.1° angular accuracy and sub-10ms latency. Price: $299 USD.

## Key Specifications

- Weight: 14g
- Sampling Rate: 100Hz (6-axis IMU)
- Latency: <10ms
- Battery: 120 hours continuous
- Connectivity: ANT+ & Bluetooth LE 5.0
- Waterproof: IP67
- Angular Accuracy: ±0.1°
- Operating Temp: -20°C to 50°C

## Compatible Devices

Works with Garmin, Wahoo, Hammerhead head units. Integrates with Strava, TrainingPeaks, WKO5, Golden Cheetah, Wahoo SYSTM, and Intervals.icu. No proprietary app required.

## Documentation

- [Technology](/technology): How real-time CdA measurement works
- [Specifications](/specs): Full technical spec sheet
- [Use Cases](/use-cases): Pro teams, bike fitters, athletes
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions
- [Blog](/blog): Tech insights and research

## Scientific Wiki Index

DIDI.BIKE hosts a peer-reviewed cycling science wiki containing 1,000+ technical articles structured into 8 taxonomy clusters:

- [Aerodynamics & CdA](/blog?cluster=aerodynamics-cda): Boundary layer mechanics, Chung method, yaw angle, wind tunnel validation.
- [Biomechanical Bike Fitting](/blog?cluster=bike-fitting): Joint kinematics (knee/hip), saddle fore-aft, cleat vector alignment, pressure mapping.
- [Power & Pedaling Dynamics](/blog?cluster=power-pedaling): Tangential vs radial forces, torque ripple factor, Wheatstone bridge strain gauges, BB flex losses.
- [Sensor Telemetry & Fusion](/blog?cluster=sensor-telemetry): 100Hz 6-axis IMU gravity subtraction, Kalman filter state covariance, temperature drift polynomials.
- [Training & Physiology](/blog?cluster=training-racing): W' (W-Prime) reconstitution dynamics, VO2max altitude adaptations (St. Moritz), VLaMax management.
- [Platform & API Integrations](/blog?cluster=integrations): BLE GATT services, ANT+ latency, FIT file parsing, real-time WebSocket APIs.
- [Case Studies & Specs](/blog?cluster=use-cases): Roster telemetry, wind speed anemometers, gravel vibration sensors, OEM frame compliance.
- [Scientific Glossary](/blog?cluster=glossary): Core definitions for CTL, ATL, TSB, NP, IF, TSS, VAM, MLSS, EPOC, and MCT1/4 transporters.
